backfill_note: Back-fill assessment cycle executed 2026-05-27. Evidence window strictly limited to events dated on or before 2026-05-26 UTC. No sources dated 2026-05-27 or later were used.
assessment_targets_source: top_entities (15 priority); rotation_backfill (5 candidates) deferred per quality-over-quota guidance

results.name: Turkey
results.key_finding: Three May 26 discrete crackdown events (Izmir tear gas, Güzelbahçe mayor detained, 93 social media blocks) all pattern-continuation; fail categorical-novelty test from May 25 ruling. Documented hold consistent with May 27 carry-forward.

results.name: Elevance Health
results.key_finding: First-baseline replacement of uniform 2.5 placeholder. Two concurrent active DOJ FCA actions (Medicare Advantage risk-adjustment fraud + multi-insurer kickbacks) warrant mid-Developing 30.0 anchored baseline. Band stable.

results.name: Bolivia
results.key_finding: Provisional first-baseline per HUMANITARIAN-BLOCKADE-FIRST-BASELINE-PROTOCOL. 14-day blockades + 3 emergency-vehicle deaths + hospital oxygen depletion warrant downward apply; non-militarized response + humanitarian corridors prevent Critical crossing.

results.name: Russia
results.key_finding: Scale-floor documented hold. Civic Death Law evidence annotated for floor-methodology ruling. Composite cannot move below 0.0.

results.name: Hungary
results.key_finding: Forward-trigger pending May 28 signing. Boundary-watch hold logically consistent with May 27 cycle's +2.3 upgrade applied after trigger fired.

results.name: Iran
results.key_finding: Scale-floor documented hold. Amnesty 2025 report (2,159 executions, highest since 1981, 80% global total) annotated for floor methodology ruling.

results.name: India
results.key_finding: Boundary-watch sub-threshold accumulator. Rohingya refoulement (40 refugees, navy vessel, UN investigator assigned) is high-severity but factual confirmation pending; standalone apply would force Critical band-crossing requiring founder decision.

results.name: United States
results.key_finding: Sub-threshold accumulator. OBBBA House passage + DOGE/rescissions are precursor signals; CBO 7.6M Medicaid loss is forecast not realized. Promote on Senate passage. Distinct from May 27's AP ICE-suicide downgrade.

results.name: Anthropic
results.key_finding: Cycle 8 band-crossing-proposed documented hold. Mythos governance positive accumulator may justify above-60 post-DC-Circuit assessed score if ruling favors Anthropic.

results.name: Italy
results.key_finding: Baseline confirmation. Anti-SLAPP transposition miss (May 7) carry-forward; Nordio referendum positive offset (53.5% No) maintains baseline. Sub-threshold accumulator -1.5 recorded.

results.name: Colombia
results.key_finding: Sub-threshold accumulator (-3.5) carried. Promote on OHCHR HRC report September-October 2026 or new categorically-novel evidence.

results.name: Figure AI
results.key_finding: Sub-threshold accumulator carry. Whistleblower lawsuit + deployment escalation carry-forward signals; May 7 change proposal is primary apply vehicle.

results.name: Canada
results.key_finding: Boundary-watch hold. Bill S-2 (Indian Act) April 30 status confirmation required; potential Exemplary→Established crossing if two-track registration confirmed.

results.name: Mexico
results.key_finding: Baseline confirmation. Cartel-displacement evidence offset by Sheinbaum non-militarization. Logically consistent with May 27 baseline-confirmation finding.

results.name: Amazon
results.key_finding: Documented hold. NLRB arc carry-forward; no new May 25-26 events. Drift-guard warning resolved to canonical 12.8.

methodology_novel_flags_addressed: SCALE-FLOOR-QUESTION-RUSSIA-IRAN-TURKEY: Russia (0.0) and Iran (2.5) issued documented holds with evidence-annotation flags pending founder methodology ruling. Turkey (15.1) is sufficiently above floor for standard documented hold; categorical-novelty test applied to new events.
HUMANITARIAN-BLOCKADE-FIRST-BASELINE-PROTOCOL: Bolivia provisional first-baseline issued with 30-day post-resolution reassessment trigger noted.

top_3_decisions.turkey: DOCUMENTED HOLD at 15.1. Three May 26 discrete events fail categorical-novelty test; logically consistent with May 27 carry-forward hold.
top_3_decisions.elevance_health: DOWNGRADE -7.5 to 30.0 (first-baseline anchored). Two concurrent active DOJ FCA actions warrant Developing-floor-proximity scoring replacing uniform placeholder. Band stable.
top_3_decisions.bolivia: DOWNGRADE -5.0 to 30.9 (provisional first-baseline). 14-day humanitarian crisis with 3 confirmed deaths warrants downward apply; non-militarized response prevents Critical crossing. Reassessment trigger in 30 days post-resolution.
